author: AayushBaniya2006
name: Chunk-Based N-gram Backoff + Score-First TTT + LeakyReLU(0.9)² + GPTQ-Int5
blurb: Order-9 chunk-based N-gram eval cache with entropy-adaptive alpha and per-order multipliers. Score-first TTT with LoRA. 11L 512d GQA 8/4, MLP 3.0x, XSA-4, LeakyReLU(0.9)², BigramHash(4096), GPTQ int5. Mean of 3 seeds: val_bpb 0.29519 (std 0.00013). N-gram cache processes 1M-token chunks with all ranks sharing cache state. Training 525s on 8xH100 SXM, eval 340s.
